aws.label: Amazon Web Services
aws.when: Deploying EC2, S3 assets, or SES email

stripe.label: Stripe
stripe.when: Payment pages, checkout tests, subscription funnels

telegram.label: Telegram user API
telegram.when: DM outreach, group monitoring, channel posts

meta.label: Meta (Facebook / Instagram ads)
meta.when: Paid social, pixel setup, or read existing Page/Ads insights

google_analytics.label: Google Analytics 4 (read-only)
google_analytics.when: Read baseline traffic/conversions for existing-marketing audit

google_search_console.label: Google Search Console (read-only)
google_search_console.when: Read queries, clicks, indexing for existing SEO audit

product_db_readonly.label: Product database (read-only)
product_db_readonly.when: Collect real signups/active users/MRR for goals and L3 metrics

metrics_api_readonly.label: Customer Metrics API (read-only)
metrics_api_readonly.when: HTTP GET metrics endpoints defined in productData.kpiMappings

rules: Never commit secret values to git
Ask user for credentials only when a registered task requires that channel
Record requested keys in intake/active.json credentialsRequested array
Record satisfied keys (names only) in credentialsProvided — not values
